title: Toward Single Bacterium Proteomics.
author: Vegvari A Zhang X Zubarev RA
content: S-EPMC10557376 PMC10557376 Toward Single Bacterium Proteomics. Bacteria are orders of magnitude smaller than mammalian cells, and while single cell proteomics (SCP) currently detects and quantifies several thousands of proteins per mammalian cell, it is not clear whether conventional SCP methods
